name: chat-mention-echo-targeting-fix
title: Fix chat first-message echo and @NPC targeting
description: User first message should immediately appear in chat, @NPC mention/target should route to NPC response, and typing/status copy should not say public channel when an NPC is targeted.
scope: frontend chat send flow, no broad UI redesign
creator: lijin
notes: 2026-05-13 fixed first-message echo loss caused by visitorState reinitialization; added per-turn pending reply target name for @NPC/selected NPC sends; verified with build and Playwright mocked browser check.
